ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "balance" REAL /* User's in-game currency balance */,
  "level" INTEGER /* User's current level */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* User's current experience points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Tool, Bludgeoning, Knife) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the item type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image representing the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_level" INTEGER /* Level of the tier (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tier's quality and characteristics */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image representing the item tier */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* A color code associated with the tier for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons_tools" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon/tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon/tool */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of weapon/tool (e.g., Tool, Bludgeoning, Knife) */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier of the weapon/tool representing its quality */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Base damage of the weapon/tool */,
  "cooldown" REAL /* Cooldown period between uses in seconds */,
  "dps" REAL /* Damage per second calculation */,
  "notable_offsets" TEXT /* Notable offsets and bonuses associated with the weapon/tool */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item affecting character movement speed */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Item's durability, reducing with each use */,
  "category" TEXT /* Specific category within the type (e.g., sword, axe) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Item rarity (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapons_tools_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapons_tools_tier FOREIGN KEY ("tier") REFERENCES item_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the weapon/tool */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon/tool in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the weapon/tool owned by the user */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item is currently equipped */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the item was acquired */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is favorited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES weapons_tools ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_inventory_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user buying the item */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user selling the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price per item in the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "trade_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the buyer to the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES weapons_tools ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon/tool being tracked */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Total usage count of the weapon/tool */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the weapon/tool was last used */,
  "average_usage_time" REAL /* Average time the item was used by players */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who have used the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES weapons_tools ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upgrade */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon/tool eligible for upgrade */,
  "upgrade_type" TEXT /* Type of upgrade (e.g., damage, cooldown) */,
  "upgrade_value" REAL /* Value of the upgrade being applied */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the upgrade in in-game currency */,
  "upgrade_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the upgrade */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level the upgrade can be upgraded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upgrades_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES weapons_tools ("item_id")
)
